win_condition: After endgame sequence, surviving player with highest total points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most gold wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Artifact Value
categories.description: Points from escaped artifact token value.

categories.label: Card Points
categories.description: VP printed on cards in deck (including Secret Tome and similar cards).

categories.label: Tokens and Gold
categories.description: Points from gold, monkey idols, and secret/mastery tokens.

categories.label: Survival/Escape Bonus
categories.description: Any bonus/eligibility tied to escaping the dungeon before knockout.
